description_long: This sconce features a circular, dark metal frame with five evenly spaced, teardrop-shaped red glass shades attached around its perimeter. The glass shades are glossy and semi-transparent, each appearing to be securely mounted to the frame, likely housing individual light sources. The metal frame is thin and minimalist, forming two concentric rings connected by short supports, giving the fixture a floating, airy appearance. The red glass shades provide a striking contrast to the dark metal, adding a decorative and warm touch. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for modern or eclectic urban environments. The fixture is likely intended for wall mounting, providing ambient or accent lighting.
description: A circular dark metal sconce with five glossy red glass teardrop shades, arranged evenly around the frame for decorative accent lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent red glass shades and the circular metal frame, with one shade at the top and two at the sides.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the alignment of four glass shades and the depth of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view displaying the arrangement of all five glass shades and the open structure of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three glass shades visible in the foreground and two partially obscured, emphasizing the circular layout.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with a circular metal frame and bold, glossy red glass shades. Its clean lines and vibrant color accents give it a contemporary and artistic flair.
